name: Showcase
description: Share your Samaris OS experience
title: "[SHOWCASE] Short description"
labels: ["showcase"]
body: |

  ## What did you do with Samaris OS?
  Describe your setup, use case, or experience.

  ## Screenshots / Video
  Share media of your Samaris OS experience.

  ## What Worked Well?
  What impressed you or worked better than expected?

  ## What Could Be Better?
  What frustrated you or felt incomplete?

  ## Hardware Setup
  Device, VM, specs — whatever is relevant.

  ---
  *Showcase: contact.samaris.os@gmail.com*
